metadata.description: Datadog APIM Callout — deploy VNet + ACI Agent + ACA callout + APIM policy. Do not edit azuredeploy.json manually; regenerate with: az bicep build -f main.bicep --outfile azuredeploy.json
Datadog API key (never logged or output)
Name of the existing APIM service
Resource group of the APIM service (defaults to this RG)
Array of APIM API IDs to apply the policy to (empty = All APIs)
Resource ID of an existing Log Analytics workspace (optional, enables ACA log collection and diagnostic settings)
Resource name prefix for all resources
Azure region (defaults to resource group location)
Datadog site
Whether to deploy the Datadog policy to APIM APIs
Enforce HTTPS on the callout ingress (ACA terminates TLS automatically)
Container image for the callout service
VNet address space
Resource ID of an existing VNet (empty = create new)
Resource ID of an existing ACA subnet (empty = create new)
Resource ID of an existing ACI subnet (empty = create new)
Enable CanNotDelete locks on critical resources (disable for dev/test)
Minimum replicas for the callout container app
Maximum replicas for the callout container app
KEDA HTTP scaler concurrent requests threshold
Custom tags to apply to all resources (merged with default dd-component tag)

variables.policyXml:
<!--
  Datadog App & API Protection: Full Azure APIM policy (inbound + outbound)

  This is the complete policy document combining the inbound (request phase)
  and outbound (response phase) policies. Apply this to your API in APIM.

  Replace <dd-apim-callout-host> with the hostname or IP of the callout service.

  This implements the 4-call pattern:
    Inbound:  Phase 1 (request headers) + conditional Phase 2 (request body)
    Outbound: Phase 3 (response headers) + conditional Phase 4 (response body)

  Fail-open: if the callout fails, times out, or returns non-200, requests and
  responses proceed unmodified.
-->
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <!-- Phase 1: Request Headers -->
    <send-request mode="new"
                  response-variable-name="ddPhase1Response"
                  timeout="3"
                  ignore-error="true">
      <set-url>https://<dd-apim-callout-host>:8080/</set-url>
      <set-method>POST</set-method>
      <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
        <value>application/json</value>
      </set-header>
      <set-body>@{
        var headers = new JObject();
        foreach (var h in context.Request.Headers) {
          headers[h.Key] = new JArray(h.Value.ToArray());
        }
        var addresses = new JObject(
          new JProperty("method", context.Request.Method),
          new JProperty("scheme", context.Request.Url.Scheme),
          new JProperty("authority", context.Request.Url.Host),
          new JProperty("path", context.Request.Url.Path + context.Request.Url.QueryString),
          new JProperty("remote_addr", context.Request.IpAddress),
          new JProperty("headers", headers)
        );
        return new JObject(
          new JProperty("addresses", addresses),
          new JProperty("phase", "<RequestHeaders>")
        ).ToString();
      }</set-body>
    </send-request>

    <!-- Fail-open: if callout failed or returned non-200, let request through -->
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(!context.Variables.ContainsKey("ddPhase1Response") || context.Variables["ddPhase1Response"] == null || ((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase1Response"]).StatusCode != 200)">
        <!-- Processor unavailable — fail open -->
      </when>
      <otherwise>

    <set-variable name="ddPhase1" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase1Response"]).Body.As<JObject>())" />

    <!-- If blocked, return the block response -->
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["block"] != null)">
        <return-response>
          <set-status code="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["block"]["status"].Value<int>())" />
          <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
            <value>@{
              var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["block"]["headers"];
              if (h != null && h["Content-Type"] != null) {
                return h["Content-Type"][0].ToString();
              }
              return "application/json";
            }</value>
          </set-header>
          <set-body>@{
            var content = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["block"]["content"];
            if (content != null) {
              return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(Convert.FromBase64String(content.ToString()));
            }
            return "";
          }</set-body>
        </return-response>
      </when>
    </choose>

    <!-- Store request-id for subsequent phases -->
    <set-variable name="ddRequestId" value="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["request-id"].ToString())" />

    <!-- Inject trace propagation headers -->
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"] != null)">
        <set-header name="x-datadog-trace-id" exists-action="override">
          <value>@{
            var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"]["X-Datadog-Trace-Id"];
            return h != null ? h[0].ToString() : "";
          }</value>
        </set-header>
        <set-header name="x-datadog-parent-id" exists-action="override">
          <value>@{
            var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"]["X-Datadog-Parent-Id"];
            return h != null ? h[0].ToString() : "";
          }</value>
        </set-header>
        <set-header name="x-datadog-sampling-priority" exists-action="override">
          <value>@{
            var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"]["X-Datadog-Sampling-Priority"];
            return h != null ? h[0].ToString() : "";
          }</value>
        </set-header>
        <set-header name="x-datadog-origin" exists-action="override">
          <value>@{
            var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"]["X-Datadog-Origin"];
            return h != null ? h[0].ToString() : "";
          }</value>
        </set-header>
        <set-header name="x-datadog-tags" exists-action="override">
          <value>@{
            var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["propagate-headers"]["X-Datadog-Tags"];
            return h != null ? h[0].ToString() : "";
          }</value>
        </set-header>
      </when>
    </choose>

    <!-- Phase 2: Request Body (conditional — only if callout requests it) -->
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["allowed-body-size"] != null)">
        <send-request mode="new"
                      response-variable-name="ddPhase2Response"
                      timeout="3"
                      ignore-error="true">
          <set-url>https://<dd-apim-callout-host>:8080/</set-url>
          <set-method>POST</set-method>
          <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
            <value>application/json</value>
          </set-header>
          <set-body>@{
            var maxSize = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase1"])["allowed-body-size"].Value<int>();
            var body = context.Request.Body?.As<byte[]>(preserveContent: true);
            var b64 = "";
            if (body != null && body.Length > 0) {
              var slice = body.Length > maxSize ? body.Take(maxSize).ToArray() : body;
              b64 = Convert.ToBase64String(slice);
            }
            var addresses = new JObject(new JProperty("body", b64));
            return new JObject(
              new JProperty("addresses", addresses),
              new JProperty("request-id", (string)context.Variables["ddRequestId"]),
              new JProperty("phase", "<RequestBody>")
            ).ToString();
          }</set-body>
        </send-request>

        <choose>
          <when condition="@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("ddPhase2Response") && context.Variables["ddPhase2Response"] != null && ((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase2Response"]).StatusCode == 200)">
            <set-variable name="ddPhase2" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase2Response"]).Body.As<JObject>())" />
            <choose>
              <when condition="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase2"])["block"] != null)">
                <return-response>
                  <set-status code="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase2"])["block"]["status"].Value<int>())" />
                  <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                    <value>@{
                      var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase2"])["block"]["headers"];
                      if (h != null && h["Content-Type"] != null) {
                        return h["Content-Type"][0].ToString();
                      }
                      return "application/json";
                    }</value>
                  </set-header>
                  <set-body>@{
                    var content = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase2"])["block"]["content"];
                    if (content != null) {
                      return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(Convert.FromBase64String(content.ToString()));
                    }
                    return "";
                  }</set-body>
                </return-response>
              </when>
            </choose>
          </when>
        </choose>
      </when>
    </choose>

      </otherwise>
    </choose>
  </inbound>
  <backend>
    <base />
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
    <!-- Phase 3: Response Headers -->
    <send-request mode="new"
                  response-variable-name="ddPhase3Response"
                  timeout="3"
                  ignore-error="true">
      <set-url>https://<dd-apim-callout-host>:8080/</set-url>
      <set-method>POST</set-method>
      <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
        <value>application/json</value>
      </set-header>
      <set-body>@{
        var headers = new JObject();
        foreach (var h in context.Response.Headers) {
          headers[h.Key] = new JArray(h.Value.ToArray());
        }
        var addresses = new JObject(
          new JProperty("status_code", context.Response.StatusCode),
          new JProperty("headers", headers)
        );
        return new JObject(
          new JProperty("addresses", addresses),
          new JProperty("request-id", context.Variables.ContainsKey("ddRequestId") ? (string)context.Variables["ddRequestId"] : ""),
          new JProperty("phase", "<ResponseHeaders>")
        ).ToString();
      }</set-body>
    </send-request>

    <choose>
      <when condition="@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("ddPhase3Response") && context.Variables["ddPhase3Response"] != null && ((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase3Response"]).StatusCode == 200)">
        <set-variable name="ddPhase3" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase3Response"]).Body.As<JObject>())" />

        <!-- If blocked, return the block response -->
        <choose>
          <when condition="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase3"])["block"] != null)">
            <return-response>
              <set-status code="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase3"])["block"]["status"].Value<int>())" />
              <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                <value>@{
                  var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase3"])["block"]["headers"];
                  if (h != null && h["Content-Type"] != null) {
                    return h["Content-Type"][0].ToString();
                  }
                  return "application/json";
                }</value>
              </set-header>
              <set-body>@{
                var content = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase3"])["block"]["content"];
                if (content != null) {
                  return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(Convert.FromBase64String(content.ToString()));
                }
                return "";
              }</set-body>
            </return-response>
          </when>
        </choose>

        <!-- Phase 4: Response Body (conditional — only if callout requests it) -->
        <choose>
          <when condition="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase3"])["allowed-body-size"] != null)">
            <send-request mode="new"
                          response-variable-name="ddPhase4Response"
                          timeout="3"
                          ignore-error="true">
              <set-url>https://<dd-apim-callout-host>:8080/</set-url>
              <set-method>POST</set-method>
              <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                <value>application/json</value>
              </set-header>
              <set-body>@{
                var maxSize = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase3"])["allowed-body-size"].Value<int>();
                var body = context.Response.Body?.As<byte[]>(preserveContent: true);
                var b64 = "";
                if (body != null && body.Length > 0) {
                  var slice = body.Length > maxSize ? body.Take(maxSize).ToArray() : body;
                  b64 = Convert.ToBase64String(slice);
                }
                var addresses = new JObject(new JProperty("body", b64));
                return new JObject(
                  new JProperty("addresses", addresses),
                  new JProperty("request-id", context.Variables.ContainsKey("ddRequestId") ? (string)context.Variables["ddRequestId"] : ""),
                  new JProperty("phase", "<ResponseBody>")
                ).ToString();
              }</set-body>
            </send-request>

            <choose>
              <when condition="@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("ddPhase4Response") && context.Variables["ddPhase4Response"] != null && ((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase4Response"]).StatusCode == 200)">
                <set-variable name="ddPhase4" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["ddPhase4Response"]).Body.As<JObject>())" />
                <choose>
                  <when condition="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase4"])["block"] != null)">
                    <return-response>
                      <set-status code="@(((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase4"])["block"]["status"].Value<int>())" />
                      <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
                        <value>@{
                          var h = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase4"])["block"]["headers"];
                          if (h != null && h["Content-Type"] != null) {
                            return h["Content-Type"][0].ToString();
                          }
                          return "application/json";
                        }</value>
                      </set-header>
                      <set-body>@{
                        var content = ((JObject)context.Variables["ddPhase4"])["block"]["content"];
                        if (content != null) {
                          return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(Convert.FromBase64String(content.ToString()));
                        }
                        return "";
                      }</set-body>
                    </return-response>
                  </when>
                </choose>
              </when>
            </choose>
          </when>
        </choose>
      </when>
    </choose>
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
    <base />
  </on-error>
</policies>

metadata.description: Azure region for all networking resources
Resource name prefix
VNet address space
ACA subnet CIDR (must be /27 or larger, within VNet address space)
ACI subnet CIDR (must be /24 or larger, within VNet address space)
APIM integration subnet CIDR (/27, within VNet address space)
Resource ID of an existing VNet (skip all networking creation if provided)
Resource ID of an existing ACA subnet (required when existingVnetId is set)
Resource ID of an existing ACI subnet (required when existingVnetId is set)
Custom tags to merge with default tags
Azure region
Resource name prefix
Datadog API key
Datadog site (e.g. datadoghq.com, datadoghq.eu)
Resource ID of the ACI subnet
Enable CanNotDelete lock
Custom tags to merge with default tags

properties.notes: Prevents accidental deletion of the Datadog Agent container group

metadata.description: Azure region
Resource name prefix
Container image for the callout service
DD Agent host IP (from agent module output)
Minimum number of replicas
Maximum number of replicas
KEDA HTTP scaler concurrent requests threshold
Resource ID of the ACA subnet
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace (optional)
Enforce HTTPS on the callout ingress (ACA terminates TLS automatically)
Enable CanNotDelete lock
Custom tags to merge with default tags

properties.appLogsConfiguration: [if(variables('hasLogAnalytics'), createObject('destination', 'log-analytics', 'logAnalyticsConfiguration', createObject('customerId', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('logAnalyticsResourceGroup')), 'Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', variables('logAnalyticsWorkspaceName')), '2022-10-01').customerId, 'sharedKey', listKeys(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('logAnalyticsResourceGroup')), 'Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', variables('logAnalyticsWorkspaceName')), '2022-10-01').primarySharedKey)), createObject('destination', ''))]

properties.notes: Prevents accidental deletion of the APIM callout ACA environment

metadata.description: Resource name prefix
Default domain of the ACA managed environment
Static IP of the ACA managed environment
Resource ID of the VNet to link the DNS zone to
Custom tags to merge with default tags
Azure region
Name of the existing APIM service
Resource group of the APIM service
Resource ID of the APIM subnet (must have an NSG attached)
Custom tags to merge with default tags

properties.scriptContent:
#!/bin/bash
      set -euo pipefail

      VNET_TYPE=$(az apim show \
        --resource-group "$APIM_RG" \
        --name "$APIM_NAME" \
        --query "virtualNetworkType" -o tsv)

      if [[ "$VNET_TYPE" == "External" || "$VNET_TYPE" == "Internal" ]]; then
        echo "APIM already has VNet integration ($VNET_TYPE). Skipping."
        echo "{\"vnetType\": \"$VNET_TYPE\", \"changed\": false}" > $AZ_SCRIPTS_OUTPUT_PATH
        exit 0
      fi

      echo "Configuring APIM VNet integration (External mode)..."
      az apim update \
        --resource-group "$APIM_RG" \
        --name "$APIM_NAME" \
        --virtual-network External \
        --set "virtualNetworkConfiguration.subnetResourceId=$APIM_SUBNET_ID" \
        -o none

      echo "{\"vnetType\": \"External\", \"changed\": true}" > $AZ_SCRIPTS_OUTPUT_PATH

metadata.description: Whether to deploy the policy to APIM APIs
Name of the existing APIM service
Array of API IDs to apply the policy to (empty = apply to All APIs at service level)
Base URL of the callout service (from container-app module)
Raw policy XML content (loaded via loadTextContent in main.bicep)

variables.inboundFragment:
[replace('<!-- Datadog APIM Callout: Add inside <inbound> after <base /> -->
<send-request mode="new" response-variable-name="ddPhase1Response" timeout="3" ignore-error="true">
  <set-url>CALLOUT_URL/</set-url>
  <!-- See azure-apim-full.xml for complete policy -->
</send-request>', 'CALLOUT_URL', parameters('calloutBaseUrl'))]
variables.outboundFragment:
[replace('<!-- Datadog APIM Callout: Add inside <outbound> after <base /> -->
<send-request mode="new" response-variable-name="ddPhase3Response" timeout="3" ignore-error="true">
  <set-url>CALLOUT_URL/</set-url>
  <!-- See azure-apim-full.xml for complete policy -->
</send-request>', 'CALLOUT_URL', parameters('calloutBaseUrl'))]

deploymentSummary.value: [format('Callout: {0} | Agent: {1} | Policy deployed: {2}', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-container-app', parameters('namePrefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.calloutBaseUrl.value, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-agent', parameters('namePrefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.agentIp.value, string(parameters('deployPolicy')))]
